Prompt authoring may proceed, but live execution waits on explicit leases, empty isolated proof root, no preexisting BEA/CDB processes, and capture span/flush/decode-window readiness.
currentDocsTruth.rebuildFrontDoor: ROADMAP-INDEX links the compact rebuild-front-door chain map. The map is routing/discoverability only and does not claim runtime, visual, gameplay, rebuild, or no-noticeable-difference parity.
currentDocsTruth.localOnlyBoundary: Hard payloads, screenshots/frame dumps, raw proof logs, copied executables, full Ghidra databases, secrets, .env* files, build output, package output, local runtime caches, local proof paths, raw proof evidence, and raw local manifests stay out of tracked docs/state unless a public-safe summary is explicitly warranted.

currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: Presentation-helper extraction, focused helper-output/static tests, storage no-delete summary, stale Git metadata pruning summary, and state reconciliation only; no AppCore, patch catalog row, byte patch, launch argument, safe-copy manifest/signature, runtime proof, release/publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim change.
